action: Produce independently digest-verified Linux and macOS crash-stress observations for one exact commit, assemble them through a fail-closed binding gate, then require classifier acceptance.

completed_slice.finding: Each platform observation must be verified against its retained identity, summary, raw log, and exact workflow commit before the artifact is uploaded.
completed_slice.verification: Source inspection confirms the workflow now invokes verify-crash-stress-observation.mjs with exact retained inputs and GITHUB_SHA, retains the JSON verifier output, and runs both observation contract test suites before artifact upload.

remaining: Obtain one completed Linux and macOS workflow run for the same exact descendant commit.
Download each platform artifact and independently confirm verification-${RUNNER_OS}.json has verified=true and the expected commit.
Run build-verified-crash-stress-packet.mjs on the two accepted verifier outputs.
Pass only the accepted packet to classify-crash-stress-evidence.mjs and retain classifier output plus workflow and artifact identities.
epistemic_limit: Committed workflow wiring does not prove hosted execution, runner authenticity, cross-platform filesystem behavior, or successful crash recovery.
